title: PBI layer prose: backlog ownership, capture duty, flip triggers, projection rule, grooming audits
action: Prose wiring of the PBI layer, one owner per fact, no duplication. (1) scribing-reference: new Backlog section — docs/backlog.md is the product backlog, one markdown table ID | Story | CoS (one line) | Status | Feature, statuses exactly proposed / in-flight / done, priority-ordered highest first, one file forever updated in place (specs pattern per D6), scribing-owned merge rules (a new deferred request appends a proposed row with next free ID; flips per D11; never fork, never a second backlog file). (2) scribing SKILL: capture duty extension (per D8, decision-0007 pattern): when the user defers work (để sau, phase 2, later, a deferred idea leaving exploring), the agent appends the PBI row unprompted in the same turn, announce-then-do; at sync/close of a feature matching a row, flip it to done + link docs/history/<feature>/ (D11b). Add the missed-capture line to Red Flags. (3) exploring SKILL: Deferred Ideas section entries feed docs/backlog.md as proposed rows (same turn); when exploring opens a feature matching an existing row, flip it to in-flight + feature slug, creating the row first if the request never passed through the backlog (D11a). (4) compounding SKILL: one line — feature close verifies the PBI row flipped done (fallback when scribing sync was skipped for no-behavior-change features). (5) routing-and-contracts reference: projection rule (per D12) — session todo lists (TaskCreate and equivalents) are ephemeral projections of cells/PBI rows, never the reverse; the repo artifact is the source. (6) grooming reference: PBI drift audit lines (in-flight row with no active feature; done feature with no row; duplicate rows for one story; each -> tiny fix cell) AND the A5 change: Fresh Session Test probe items must name their one-command fix (bee-scribing bootstrap for Q1/Q2, commands_detect + confirmation for Q3/Q4) instead of an open-ended task. (7) AGENTS.block.md: ONE pointer line for docs/backlog.md in the Working files section, worded to disambiguate the two backlogs — docs/backlog.md = product backlog (PBI rows), .bee/backlog.jsonl = machine friction/grooming items (budget: file is 90 lines, stay under 100); apply the same disambiguation to the grooming-reference backlog-without-outcome entropy term wording if it could be misread. (8) docs/07-contracts.md: one line noting bee_status --json gained the additive pbi field ({proposed, in_flight, done} | null). The missed-capture Red Flags line goes in scribing SKILL.md (not grooming). Keep every SKILL.md under 200 lines; details live in references.

truths: The backlog table template with the 3-status enum and merge rules exists in scribing-reference and nowhere else (one owner)
Both flip triggers (D11a exploring open -> in-flight, D11b close -> done + history link) are stated at their owning skills, citing D11
The grooming FST probe rows name their one-command fixes (bootstrap / commands_detect)
AGENTS.block.md gained exactly one backlog line and stays under 100 lines

artifacts.substantive: Backlog section with table template, status enum, merge rules, no TODO stubs

key_links: prose references the runnable surfaces shipped by harness10-6 (bee_status PBI counts, preamble line) rather than describing unbuilt machinery
prohibitions: No hook or helper enforcement of PBI transitions (D7 - prose-ruled + grooming-audited only)
No new gates, no changes to gate wording
No mechanical code changes in this cell (prose + AGENTS block only)
No second location for the backlog table schema (single owner: scribing-reference)

verify: grep -qi 'backlog' skills/bee-scribing/references/scribing-reference.md && grep -qi 'backlog' skills/bee-hive/templates/AGENTS.block.md && grep -qi 'projection|todo list' skills/bee-hive/references/routing-and-contracts.md && [ $(wc -l < skills/bee-hive/templates/AGENTS.block.md) -le 100 ] && [ $(wc -l < skills/bee-scribing/SKILL.md) -le 200 ] && [ $(wc -l < skills/bee-exploring/SKILL.md) -le 200 ] && [ $(wc -l < skills/bee-compounding/SKILL.md) -le 200 ] && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs

trace.outcome: PBI-layer prose wired across 8 files, single-owner honored: backlog table schema/enum/merge-rules live only in scribing-reference (D6); flip triggers placed at owners (D11a exploring in-flight, D11b scribing sync + compounding fallback); D8 capture duty + Red Flag in scribing SKILL; D12 projection rule in routing-and-contracts; A5/D10 FST probes name one-command fix + PBI drift audit in grooming; one AGENTS.block backlog pointer (91<=100); additive pbi field noted in 07-contracts. References harness10-6 runnable surfaces, adds no machinery (D7 prose-only).
